response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, but lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership, or formal AI education—key requirements for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial drive with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across cloud-native tools (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK) and multiple languages
Active knowledge sharing and workshop leadership indicating strong influence and communication skills
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or shipping AI/ML products or platforms
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS only
Limited evidence of strategic cloud product roadmap leadership at director level
